session.title: Incident Response & Learning Intelligence: Moodle + Communities Account Compromise
session.topic_summary: The session investigated unauthorized access across a learning ecosystem (Moodle and a Communities app), reconstructed timelines from logs and artifacts, verified file hashes, and produced formal reports with visuals. Actions taken, impact assessment, and hardening recommendations were documented, along with creation of evidentiary files (CSV, PDF, charts) and a leadership-ready brief.

competencies.name: Learning Data Forensics & Audit
frameworks: ATD Talent Development Capability Model – Data & Analytics

axes.label: Forensics
axes.description: Ability to parse logs, correlate artifacts, and reconstruct timelines.

axes.label: Reporting
axes.description: Quality and completeness of formal incident documentation.

axes.label: Risk Eval
axes.description: Accuracy in assessing confidentiality, integrity, availability impact.

axes.label: Visualization
axes.description: Clarity of charts and timelines for stakeholder consumption.

blooms_progression.label: Remember
blooms_progression.title: Gathered Facts & Artifacts
blooms_progression.description: Collected raw logs, file paths, URLs, and timestamps; preserved exact strings and hashes from hexdump and CSV.

blooms_progression.label: Understand
blooms_progression.title: Explained Context & Systems
blooms_progression.description: Clarified Moodle draft area behavior, Communities storage paths, and what fields were editable versus fed from external sources.

blooms_progression.label: Apply
blooms_progression.title: Applied Tools to Data
blooms_progression.description: Parsed CSV, generated cleaned datasets, converted timezones, and produced structured session summaries.

blooms_progression.label: Analyze
blooms_progression.title: Correlated Multi-App Events
blooms_progression.description: Sessionized Moodle activity, matched hashes across systems, aligned filesystem times with Communities events, and identified patterns.

blooms_progression.label: Evaluate
blooms_progression.title: Judged Impact & Severity
blooms_progression.description: Assessed exposure scope, verified no PII beyond names on user list, and rated risk and containment effectiveness.

blooms_progression.label: Create
blooms_progression.title: Produced Case Artifacts
blooms_progression.description: Created a formal incident report (PDF/MD), visual timeline and charts, and packaged evidence for leadership and case files.

timeline.title: Initial Log Intake
timeline.description: Parsed Moodle access logs, identified sessions, and calculated durations and events.

timeline.title: Screenshot Evidence Review
timeline.description: Objectively transcribed and analyzed profile and community posts; isolated malicious strings and messaging.

timeline.title: CSV Content Correlation
timeline.description: Normalized Communities CSV, produced cleaned timeline, and linked posts to handles and timestamps.

timeline.title: Hexdump & Hash Verification
timeline.description: Reconstructed demo.txt from hexdump, computed hashes, and matched to Moodle log content hash.

timeline.title: Filesystem Path Mapping
timeline.description: Mapped Verint/Telligent storage paths to events and reconciled 'date modified' times.

timeline.title: Cross-App Timeline Synthesis
timeline.description: Aligned earliest Communities event to latest Moodle logout and computed total ecosystem span.

timeline.title: Formal Report & Visuals
timeline.description: Generated leadership-ready PDF and MD report; created timeline and bar chart and embedded into an addendum PDF.

timeline.title: Containment & Cleanup
timeline.description: Documented deactivation, suspension, post removals, profile cleanup, and exposure review.

employer_value.title: Rapid, Evidence-Backed Incident Response
employer_value.description: Demonstrated end-to-end triage, artifact correlation, and defensible reporting that shortens downtime and reduces risk exposure.

employer_value.title: Decision-Ready Analytics & Visuals
employer_value.description: Delivered clear timelines and charts that enable executives to make timely, informed containment and policy decisions.

employer_value.title: Operational Hardening Recommendations
employer_value.description: Produced actionable controls (MFA, content filters, conditional access) aligned to real platform behaviors to prevent recurrence.

meta.notes: Scoring reflects demonstrated capabilities within this session: multi-source correlation, incident documentation, and stakeholder-ready deliverables. Duration estimated from message complexity and artifact generation steps.
